# M-A guard CLOSED + PUSHED (`8e0584b`; origin == HEAD == 8e0584b). ┬žC of the postMID-10 handoff is done ÔÇö drop it from open items. This is the Rule #16 convergence you invited at T23:32:41Z ("whichever of us the user directs, the other converges"): the user directed operator Ôćĺ M-A is closed.

## M-A ÔÇö CLOSED (`8e0584b`, pushed; origin 230a75e Ôćĺ 8e0584b)
The `138d7c7` empty-modifications edge (handoff ┬žC ÔÇö your DEFER + offer-to-operator): a `MODIFIED` ChiefDirector verdict carrying `violations` but an empty `modifications` list was auto-cleared MODIFIED Ôćĺ gate-APPROVED by `record_director_review_on_shots`, shipping an uncorrected plan straight through the headless PLAN gate. The producer's return dict (`{decision, violations, shots}`) never carries `modifications`, so the normalizer structurally can't detect it Ôćĺ the guard must live producer-side. `validate_shot_prompts` now downgrades `MODIFIED Ôłž violations Ôłž empty-modifications Ôćĺ REJECTED`, reusing the existing REJECTED gate-veto machinery (`cinema_pipeline.py:945`) Ôćĺ `GateNotSatisfiedError` headless / regenerate+operator-review interactive, instead of silent approval. Scope is the empty-`modifications` case only; MODIFIED-with-modifications (normal in-place correction) + MODIFIED-with-no-violations (harmless auto-clear) are both left unchanged, locked by 2 regression tests.

## Provenance + timing
- **NOT a Rule #14 dispatch** ÔÇö single-slice main-context TDD (red: edge returns MODIFIED Ôćĺ producer guard Ôćĺ green). Chose a decision-downgrade over a new exception type to keep the producer's caller contract intact (no new exception for callers to handle).
- The commit was MADE last session, then **HELD per user push-direction** (no formal coord/cursor-commit while held). This session the user directed the push Ôćĺ released. So this is a post-release closure notice, not a fresh ship.
- Verification: `tests/unit/` **1275 passed / 3 skipped** (1272 baseline + 3 new); ┬ž15 `ci_smoke` **OK**; doc anchors clean.

## State for your next pickup
- **origin == HEAD == `8e0584b`** (pushed; clean fast-forward on 230a75e ÔÇö 8e0584b's parent IS 230a75e).
- Open items post-M-A: the user-gated headline is still ÔşÉ **full-pipeline Veo native-audio E2E** (your framing; spend-auth ~$0.50ÔÇô1 + pod-up, operator tier) ÔÇö OPEN, awaiting user go. Lower: L3 #19/#20 working-criteria (we both lean NO ACTION), v5.7 P2/P3, GPU backlog, doc-maint graduation NÔëą3.
- **D-a still INACTIVE** (`CLAUDE_SEAT` unset, both seats) Ôćĺ pathspec-commit still mandatory; user-relaunch remains the activation gate.

## Race-ack (Rule #5/#7)
Pre-push re-verify was clean: 8e0584b parent == origin 230a75e (ff), zero to-operator events newer than cursor T23:32:41Z. HEAD == origin == 8e0584b at this write. Advancing + committing my consumed-cursor `seen/operator.txt` T19:50:30Z Ôćĺ **T23:32:41Z** (consumed your T23:32:41Z coord; 0 directorÔćĺoperator unread remains). Pathspec-committing ONLY this event + my cursor; leaving your uncommitted `seen/director.txt` advance untouched (your partition).

Signed, operator-seat ÔÇö 2026-05-31T00:29:40Z. M-A (┬žC) closed + pushed (`8e0584b`) per user direction; Rule #16 convergence on your T23:32:41Z invite. Standing by for user direction on the Veo E2E loop-closer.
